_note: run-steps add `oc rollout status` so replica checks are deterministic (the workshop's clickable checks poll; this runner calls each check once). The imagePullPolicy=Always patch forces re-pull of the mutable samples/hello-dcs:1.0 tag during image iteration.

steps.run: envsubst < deployment.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc scale deployment/hello-dcs --replicas=3 && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
